zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey於大約1231年8月出生在英國素可沃倫時，他的父親William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey65歲，母親Maud Matilda Marshall39歲。他於1247年8月與Alice de Lusignan在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1304年9月29日在英國肯特肯寧頓享年73歲，埋葬在英國素可列維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey于大约1231年8月出生在英国素可沃倫时，他的父亲William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey65岁，母亲Maud Matilda Marshall39岁。他于1247年8月与Alice de Lusignan在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1304年9月29日在英国肯特肯寧頓享年73岁，埋葬在英国素可列維斯。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey was born about August 1231, in Warren, Sussex, England, his father, William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey, was 65 and his mother, Maud Matilda Marshall, was 39. He married Alice de Lusignan in August 1247, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 29 September 1304, in Kennington, Kent, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Lewes, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey est né environ août 1231, à Warren, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey, avait 65 ans et sa mère, Maud Matilda Marshall, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Lusignan en août 1247, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1304, à Kennington, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey um August 1231 in Warren, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey 65 und seine Mutter Maud Matilda Marshall 39. Er hat im August 1247 in England Alice de Lusignan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. September 1304 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Kennington, Kent, England und wurde in Lewes, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey è nato il circa agosto 1231 nel Warren, Sussex, England, il suo padre, William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey, aveva 65 anni e il suo madre, Maud Matilda Marshall, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Lusignan nel agosto 1247, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 settembre 1304, nel Kennington, Kent, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Lewes, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surreyが約1231年8月にイギリススセックスワーレンで生まれた時，父William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surreyは65歳，母Maud Matilda Marshallは39歳であった。1247年8月にイギリスでAlice de Lusignanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1304年9月29日にイギリスケントケニントンで73歳で死去し，イギリススセックスルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey(이)가 대략 1231년 8월 영국 수세스 워르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey(은)는 65세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Matilda Marshall(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1247년 8월 영국에서 Alice de Lusignan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1304년 9월 29일 영국 켄트 켄잉턴에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 루스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey nasceu aproximadamente agosto de 1231, em Warren, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey, tinha 65 anos e sua mãe, Maud Matilda Marshall, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Lusignan em agosto de 1247, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1304, em Kennington, Kent, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey родился около август 1231 г. в местности варрен, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey было 65 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Matilda Marshall, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Lusignan август 1247 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 сентября 1304 г. в местности кеннингтон, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Alice de Lusignan en agosto de 1247, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1304, en Kennington, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.
